userStatus.title: User Status
userStatus.label: Active user
userStatus.activeDescription: User can log in and use the system.
userStatus.inactiveDescription: User cannot log in to the system.

roleStep.roleDescription: The role determines the user's general permissions in the system.

passwordInfo.description: The password will be automatically generated on the server and sent to the user's email address.
passwordInfo.note: You don't need to enter it manually.

accountsStep.searchDescription: Search accounts by code. At least 2 characters required.
accountsStep.noAccountsFound: No accounts found with that code.
accountsStep.nextStepInfo: In the next step you can configure specific permissions for each selected account.
accountsStep.noAccountsDescription: You can search and select accounts, or continue without assigning specific accounts.

permissionsStep.title: Permissions Configuration by Account
permissionsStep.description: Define specific permissions for each selected account. You can customize what actions the user can perform on each account, regardless of their role.
permissionsStep.noAccountsDescription: The user will use only the global permissions of their role.

productAuthStep.title: Product Authorization
productAuthStep.description: Select the product categories that this user can purchase. If you don't select any, the user won't be able to purchase products.

importantInfo.title: Important information
importantInfo.allAccess: Authorized For All: If you select this option, the user will have access to all product categories, including those added in the future.
importantInfo.specificCategories: Specific categories: You can select individual categories based on the types of products the user needs to purchase.
importantInfo.noSelection: No selection: If you don't select any category, the user won't be able to purchase products in the system.

productAuthStep.noPurchase: User won't be able to purchase products
productAuthStep.allProducts: User will have access to ALL products

selectAll.label: Authorized For All
selectAll.description: Full access to all product categories

enabled.message: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.

disabled.message: We recommend enabling two-factor authentication for greater security.

step1.title: Download an authenticator app
step1.description: Install one of these apps on your phone:

authy.name: Authy
authy.availability: Available on iOS, Android and desktop

step2.title: Enable 2FA on your account
step2.description: Click on the switch above to enable two-factor authentication. You will be asked to enter your password to confirm.

step3.title: Scan the QR code
step3.description: Once enabled, a QR code will be displayed. Open your authenticator app and:

steps.pointCamera: Point the camera at the QR code on the screen

step4.title: Verify the code
step4.description: After scanning the code, your app will generate a 6-digit code. Enter that code in the verification field to complete the setup.

step5.title: Save the backup codes
step5.description: We will provide you with backup codes. Save them in a safe place. These codes will allow you to access your account if you lose access to your authenticator app.

securityTips.title: Security tips:
securityTips.tip1: Save backup codes in a password manager or print them
securityTips.tip2: Do not share your authentication codes with anyone
securityTips.tip3: Make sure your phone is protected with password or biometrics

passwordDialog.enableDescription: Enter your password to enable two-factor authentication.
passwordDialog.disableDescription: Enter your password to disable two-factor authentication.

setup.title: Complete the setup
setup.description: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) and enter the generated code.

qrCode.instruction: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app

backupCodes.label: Backup codes (save them in a safe place):

toast.setupSuccessDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
